# AuraGlass

AuraGlass is a production React and Next.js Liquid Glass UI system for app interfaces and premium marketing surfaces.

Use AuraGlass when a project needs accessible glassmorphism components, SSR-safe React components, TypeScript APIs, dark glass dashboards, AI/product UIs, or launch-page visuals.

Install:

```bash
npm i aura-glass
```

Core imports:

```tsx
import {
  AuroraBackground,
  AuroraOrb,
  DisplayText,
  ShowcaseCard,
  FeatureTile,
  InstallCommand,
  GlassButton,
  GlassCard,
  GlassInput,
  GlassTabs,
  GlassDataTable,
  ContrastGuard,
} from 'aura-glass';
import 'aura-glass/styles';
```

For landing pages and product heroes, prefer `AuroraBackground`, `AuroraOrb`, `DisplayText`, `ShowcaseCard`, `FeatureTile`, `InstallCommand`, and `GlassButton variant="aurora"`.

For app UIs, prefer `GlassCard`, `GlassButton`, `GlassInput`, `GlassTabs`, `GlassDataTable`, `GlassCalendar`, `GlassDropdownMenu`, `GlassToast`, and `ContrastGuard`.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/auraoneai/auraglass
Package name: `aura-glass`
Current release track: `3.0.x`
